programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Kayleigh Davies are in Birmingham, treasure hunting with Angela and Mike.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross's flirting technique fails to impress. Joey is in for a surprise when he tells everyone about his big television appearance.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Amazing Railway Adventures with Nick Knowles
programme.desc: Nick travels from the extraordinary landscapes of Peru to Machu Picchu, visiting the world's fourth highest train station and Lake Titicaca. (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups go on a night-time adventure to try to stay awake longer than the moon, but they keep falling asleep. (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: When Holly's wand catches a cold, she is given a brand new WiseWand 3000 as a replacement. The only problem is, it doesn't do any magic at all! (VS).

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig receives a letter saying that he must go away on business, Peppa, Mummy and George go along too.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: When Mummy Sheep learns that she has got a new job far away, Peppa and Suzy wonder how they can stay best friends.

programme.title: Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups are pretending to fly so mix up a Flying Adventure to learn how to really fly. But when Spin can't do it, will he find another way to join his friends in the sky.

programme.title: Milkshake! Monkey
programme.desc: Preschool series starring an inquisitive puppet. Milkshake Monkey's friends are playing ball games. Monkey is brilliant at kicking, but needs a little help with catching.

programme.title: Milo
programme.desc: Milo, Lofty and Lark take over as royal guards to transport and protect Queen Mabel's Crown Jewels. When Mr Croc plans to steal the jewels, Milo, Lofty and Lark must stand guard.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends All Engines Go!
programme.desc: Kana and Thomas deliver aquarium materials for the Vicarstown Fish Day, while Percy and Nia to deliver the fish themselves.

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Sarah teaches Nipper how to do a high-five, and it's really great until he wanders away from her and starts an oven fire with his paw.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip and Posy are playing a fun game where they can't touch the ground for fear that crocodiles will chomp them in Croc Attack. However, Pip starts to become obsessed with playing.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is at Suzy's house and there is a pile of cardboard boxes so they play with them. Peppa and her friends turn the boxes into a shop, a spaceship and even a hospital.

programme.title: Paw Patrol: Jet to the Rescue
programme.desc: The Princess of Blaffenburcht is having her birthday party. But if her birthday present ends up in the wrong hands, it causes a lot of problems.

programme.title: Animal Care Club
programme.desc: The cadets care for all kinds of pets, giving check-ups to a cuddly puppy and a chirpy budgie, listening to a corn snake's heartbeat, and finding out what's making a dog's ears itchy.

programme.title: The Creature Cases
programme.desc: When a naked mole rat princess goes missing, Sam and Kit are called in to find her. But the open desert is no place for a defenceless mole rat.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick loses the remote in the cushions, so he journeys into the couch to track it down.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson hosts the show that helps people find the hidden treasure in their home to sell at auction and make a dream come true.

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: It's high summer in Devonandtime for the guests at Crealy Theme Park & Resort to relax and let their hair down. But for the staff, there's no time to put their feet up.

programme.title: Happy Campers: The Caravan Park
programme.desc: For receptionist Denise, working the summer season means being constantly on the move, as she patrols the park to make sure incoming campers are pitched-up to perfection.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Cruise of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Susan explores the Caribbean by super yacht - including St Martin's Maho Beach and Anguilla's nature hike. Plus, she's served champagne by the captain from a surfboard.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Cruise of a Lifetime
programme.desc: Susan's cruise continues as she explores pristine islands, snorkels at Sandy Spit, discovers wildlife on Prickly Pear, and tries hi-tech sport e-foiling in St Barts.

programme.title: Mrs Caldicot's Cabbage War
programme.desc: Comedy starring Pauline Collins and Peter Capaldi. After her husband's death forces a widow in to a nursing home, she seeks her independence.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Mrs Caldicot's Cabbage War
programme.desc: Comedy starring Pauline Collins and Peter Capaldi. After her husband's death forces a widow in to a nursing home, she seeks her independence.

programme.title: Runaway Bride
programme.desc: Romantic comedy starring Julia Roberts and Richard Gere. A cynical reporter decides to write a story about a woman who has left three men at the altar.

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: Runaway Bride
programme.desc: Romantic comedy starring Julia Roberts and Richard Gere. A cynical reporter decides to write a story about a woman who has left three men at the altar.

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Charlie Bigham: Britain's Britain's Poshest Ready Meal
programme.desc: There's a new breed of ultra-posh ready meals, and leading the charge is Charlie Bigham. We ask if a ready meal ever be worth such an inflated price tag.

programme.title: The Air Fryer Diet: Lose Weight Cook Fast
programme.desc: Cherry Healey taste-tests a week's worth of calorie-controlled meals that can all be made in an air fryer - from speedy breakfasts to ideas for lunch and hearty dinners.

programme.title: Rich Holiday, Poor Holiday
programme.desc: This week's episode shows how wildly contrasting two holidays can be in the same city - Lisbon - when you have two very different budgets from opposite ends of the wealth divide.

programme.title: Rich Wedding, Poor Wedding
programme.desc: Two couples from completely different financial worlds are thrown into the ultimate wedding experiment as they swap budgets - and with it, their expectations, dreams, and comfort zones.

programme.title: When Parties Go Horribly Wrong
programme.desc: A hilarious - occasionally jaw-dropping - celebration of gatherings gone awry, including party game gaffes, disco disasters, pole-dancing parents, and buffet brawls.

programme.title: The World's Most Luxurious Cruise
programme.desc: Cruising the Med, the crew are on tenterhooks as travel writer Adam Coulter is on board, sampling the spa, the food, and taking an excursion to a Spanish rum distillery.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser David Fergus are in Derbyshire, treasure hunting with Anna and Steve.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Paul Hayes are in Yorkshire, treasure hunting with Gillian and her son Matthew.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The guys take a ride with a police officer. Rachel overhears a telephone message for Ross.

programme.title: **Visually Signed**The Highland Vet
programme.desc: Observational documentary series following vets in Thurso and Wick. A Tamaskan puppy has been attacked, and Guy's social plans are put on pause by a heifer. (VS).

programme.title: Entertainment News on 5
programme.desc: A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Mixmups
programme.desc: The Mixmups go on an adventure to find a helper pet for Spin but the chosen pet keeps hiding. Will the Mixmups find another way to make the Booferoo come out and play? (VS).

programme.title: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The friends are playing superheroes and supervillains - but Strawberry takes her supervillain role a little too far. (VS).

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa's pet Polly Parrot comes to stay. Peppa and George love her but Polly flies away. Can George get her back.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family share a picnic with Mr Zebra the Postman and Zoe Zebra. But when it's time to go home, Peppa leaves her teddy behind.

programme.title: Tweedy & Fluff
programme.desc: Fluff climbs into a wellington boot looking for his beloved Whizzy Button but can't get back out again! Tweedy to the rescue.

programme.title: Treehouse
programme.desc: When Badger is accidentally covered in paint, Squiggle and his friends face the tricky task of persuading him to take a bath. The only problem is Badger doesn't like baths.

programme.title: Thomas and Friends Special: Start Your Engines! When James pulls a very long train and comes off the rails, Philip races to stop him falling off a bridge
Fireman Sam
programme.desc: When James, Mandy and Annie use the horse and cart to deliver their cherry pop to The Taste of Pontypandy competition, chaos ensues.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Inspired by their favourite television programme, Peppa and George want to be famous detectives too. Daddy Pig gives them a mystery to solve.

programme.title: Pip and Posy
programme.desc: Pip and Posy give out medals for winning games. When Zac joins in, he isn't very good, but they fix the games for him to win. But Zac gets upset as he wants to earn the medals.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Farmer Al's harvest machine goes haywire and shakes up Adventure Bay, even threatening to rock the Lookout off its foundation.

programme.title: Move It Milkshakers!
programme.desc: Join Kemi and Derek for a high-energy preschool adventure that gets little ones learning and moving! In this edition, the pair are ready to 'Move It' as they introduce the letter A.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Cafe Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends are playing in their clubhouse. The Clubhouse has a fold down counter at the front. The children pretend to be a little shop for the parents to buy things from.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: The nurse is popping around, and she decides that today's visit should be all about how to hold a baby. The nurse shows Peppa a special way for a small person to safely hold a baby.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: It's Dinoween night, but Tia is scared of the dark.

programme.title: Stan & Gran
programme.desc: Stan and Gran are enjoying a beach clean, but the rubbish seems to have a mind of its own! When a yoghurt pot goes walk-about, Stan spies a mystery.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: ...Bear Cub. When a windstorm sends a polar bear cub down to Adventure Bay, it's up to Ryder, Everest, and the pups to bring the baby bear back to its family.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.desc: Paddington, Jonathan and Judy become trainee lifeguards and end up rescuing Mr Brown with Taylor the lifeguard's help.

programme.title: Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Miss Cookie organises a nature trail for Lucy and her class, but it goes right through the Little Kingdom.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa's older cousin Chloe comes to visit, and Peppa must play games by somebody else's rules for a change.

programme.title: Odo
programme.desc: Odo and Doodle volunteer to spend the day protecting a delicate plant. With the help of their friends Reggie the Fox and Michael the Mouse, they keep their leafy friend safe.

programme.title: Milkshake! World of Dance
programme.desc: Join Kiera as she discovers all about the wonderful world of dancing with the help of some Milkshakers. Kiera as she discovers all about the wonderful world of ballet dancing.

programme.title: Milkshake! Story Den
programme.desc: Join Olivia for a story about a day when Georgia notices objects moving around the house. Is it something spooky!? Clever Georgia debunks the mysteries with explanations and no fear.

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: Start the day with a dose of hard-hitting debate, your phone calls and a little fun - all driven by Jeremy's unique style.

programme.title: Storm & Alexis
programme.desc: Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: Matt Allwright
programme.desc: Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: Castle and Beckett investigate the murder of an art gallery owner, but the lead suspect has lost his memory.

programme.title: Castle
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a bridesmaid at a wedding, Castle meets an old girlfriend - the bride Kyra.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: In Holywood, County Down, a piece of land has been transformed into an edible forest garden shaped by patience, dedication, and care for wildlife.

programme.title: Lost on Safari with Jane McDonald
programme.desc: Jane discovers the majestic continent of Africa as a spectacular adventure awaits her on a once-in-a-lifetime safari in Kenya, where she also spends an unforgettable night sleeping under stars.

programme.title: Love Nature
programme.desc: In Eastbourne, we join locals who have planted thousands of trees hoping to make the town carbon neutral. Founded six years ago, the charity now has hundreds of volunteers rewilding.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan takes a trip to the South Downs home of Winnie the Pooh, enjoying picture postcard scenery and a dose of childhood nostalgia, topped off with a trip to Hundred Acre Wood.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programme.desc: PC Martain Anderson pursues a BMW driving on cloned plates. What do the driver and passengers have to hide? In Newcastle, a cop tails a car doing 50mph in a 30.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Firearms Squad responds to reports of a machete gang trying to break into a house. And a rude suspected drink driver is caught pulling racetrack moves with a baby on the back seat.

programme.title: Number One Fan
programme.desc: Thriller with Sally Lindsay and Jill Halfpenny. TV star Lucy is saved from a mugging by 'number one fan' Donna, and taken into Lucy's inner circle - but Donna has an ulterior motive..

programme.title: Police: Night Shift 999
programme.desc: All roads policing officers are called to attend what might be a potentially fatal collision on the M5. And at the scene there's a truck on fire at the side of the carriageway.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: the driver fails to stop, before heading the wrong way down a dual carriageway. And the race is on to save a driver whose car careered into a swamp.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Duncan and the firearms team find themselves getting more than they bargained for when German Shepherd Tia joins them on a tense search.

programme.title: Cruise TV with LoveitBookit
programme.desc: Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Jules Hudson and expert appraiser David Fergus are in Bristol, treasure hunting with Vic and Janet and their granddaughter Danielle.

programme.title: Cash in the Attic
programme.desc: Chris Kamara and expert appraiser Kayleigh Davies are in Grimsby, treasure hunting with Alison and David.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe's boyfriend wants to move in with her. Ross and Joey involve Chandler and Monica in an obsessive game.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey's first major film role leads to an adventure in Las Vegas. Phoebe cannot remember why she hates Ross.

programme.title: **Visually Signed**The Highland Vet
programme.desc: Two rescued grey seal pups are brought in for emergency care. (VS).
